commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer selection between overlapping open fixes plus acceptance of the 2s shutdown cap; there is no narrow automated repair left on this PR.; Cleared: The diff only changes CLI stdio shutdown behavior and tests; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, secrets, package scripts, or supply-chain surfaces. (sha=d083a017a187aa37406479bc09b9102319cff50c)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes CLI forced-exit shutdown to flush stdout and stderr with a 2s fallback, then adds POSIX integration coverage for delayed pipes, stalled readers, and early-closing consumers.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main emits large JSON through stdout and then schedules a hard exit after 50ms without stream-drain handling, and the PR supplies live before/after byte counts for a delayed >64 KiB pipe; I did not run the live repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer selection between overlapping open fixes plus acceptance of the 2s shutdown cap; there is no narrow automated repair left on this PR.

target.title: fix: flush stdout before forced exit to avoid 64KB pipe truncation
